'''takuku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ugger|ugger]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-k-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ugger|ugger]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| takuku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tækikith|tækikith]] || [[word:tækikij|tækikij]] || [[word:tækikish|tækikish]] || [[word:tækiki|tækiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:takukukuth|takukukuth]] || [[word:takukukuj|takukukuj]] || [[word:takukukush|takukukush]] || [[word:takukuku|takukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:takukuth|takukuth]] || [[word:takukuj|takukuj]] || [[word:takukush|takukush]] || [[word:takuku|takuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:takufkuth|takufkuth]] || [[word:takufkuj|takufkuj]] || [[word:takufkush|takufkush]] || [[word:takufkuf|takufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:takukuthu|takukuthu]] || [[word:takukuju|takukuju]] || [[word:takukushu|takukushu]] || [[word:takukuku|takukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:takukuth|takukuth]] || [[word:takukuj|takukuj]] || [[word:takukush|takukush]] || [[word:takuku|takuku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:takukuthul|takukuthul]] || [[word:takukujul|takukujul]] || [[word:takukushul|takukushul]] || [[word:takukukul|takukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:takukuthuthu|takukuthuthu]] || [[word:takukujuju|takukujuju]] || [[word:takukushushu|takukushushu]] || [[word:takukuku|takukuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:takukuthun|takukuthun]] || [[word:takukujun|takukujun]] || [[word:takukushun|takukushun]] || [[word:takukukun|takukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:takukuthuoro|takukuthuoro]] || [[word:takukujuoro|takukujuoro]] || [[word:takukushuoro|takukushuoro]] || [[word:takukukuoro|takukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
